meaning: n.(演讲的)结束语,演讲高谈阔论
examples: The third part is the peroration.
The seventh part is brief peroration.
He summarized his main points in his peroration.
Politics, he now claims in an eloquent but hardly off-the-cuff peroration, is the natural culmination of his life.
My husband then launched into a peroration about the unfairness of public pensions.
